subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto the call of this Exalted One. By God! He, verily, is the Most Exalted One speaking from the direction of the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی اسمع ندآء هذا العلی تالله انه لعلی الاعلی اذا ینطق عن جهه العرش
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @station of the Manifestation of God
